title: wedelia modesta
intro: Wedelia modesta, also known as Buttercup or Yellow Daisy, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Wedelia modesta include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
